# AML Verifier Prototype – Installation Guide

This document explains how to install and run the AML Verifier prototype with automated spot fines.

---

## 1. Requirements
- [Anaconda](https://www.anaconda.com/download) (Python 3.10 or later)
- Git (optional, for cloning the repository)
- Operating System: Windows, macOS, or Linux

---

## 2. Setup Instructions

### Step 1: Clone or Download
- Clone the repository:
  ```bash
  git clone https://github.com/your-org/aml-verifier.git
